top_signals.title: Big Treasury Block Sales Drive ‘Capitulation’ Selloff in Bonds
top_signals.summary: A series of large sales in US Treasury futures exacerbated a selloff in the $31 trillion government debt market, as concern about resurgent inflation pushed investors to price in higher interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
